  • Method Details

    • assetId

      public CompressedOrder.Builder assetId(String assetId)
      Apex Asset ID for this asset. This will not be returned in the initial CreateOrder response and will be available after an order completes validation. If the provided identifier does not match any Apex asset available for trading, an OrderRejectReason of "UNKNOWN_SECURITY" will be returned and the asset_id will not be set.

    • assetId

      public CompressedOrder.Builder assetId(Optional<String> assetId)
      Apex Asset ID for this asset. This will not be returned in the initial CreateOrder response and will be available after an order completes validation. If the provided identifier does not match any Apex asset available for trading, an OrderRejectReason of "UNKNOWN_SECURITY" will be returned and the asset_id will not be set.

    • assetType

      public CompressedOrder.Builder assetType(CompressedOrderAssetType assetType)
      The type of the asset in this order

    • assetType

      public CompressedOrder.Builder assetType(Optional<? extends CompressedOrderAssetType> assetType)
      The type of the asset in this order

    • averagePriceAccountId

      public CompressedOrder.Builder averagePriceAccountId(String averagePriceAccountId)
      The identifier of the account transacting this order

    • averagePriceAccountId

      public CompressedOrder.Builder averagePriceAccountId(Optional<String> averagePriceAccountId)
      The identifier of the account transacting this order

    • averagePrices

      public CompressedOrder.Builder averagePrices(List<BasketTradingExecutedPrice> averagePrices)
      The average prices, as weighted averages, across all executions in this order. Will be absent if an order has no executions.

      When asset_type = EQUITY, there will be at most one value present, with a type of PRICE_PER_UNIT. This will have up to 4 decimal places for USD amounts less than $1, and a maximum of two for larger USD amounts.

    • averagePrices

      public CompressedOrder.Builder averagePrices(Optional<? extends List<BasketTradingExecutedPrice>> averagePrices)
      The average prices, as weighted averages, across all executions in this order. Will be absent if an order has no executions.

      When asset_type = EQUITY, there will be at most one value present, with a type of PRICE_PER_UNIT. This will have up to 4 decimal places for USD amounts less than $1, and a maximum of two for larger USD amounts.

    • compressedOrderId

      public CompressedOrder.Builder compressedOrderId(String compressedOrderId)
      System generated unique id for the compressed order.

    • compressedOrderId

      public CompressedOrder.Builder compressedOrderId(Optional<String> compressedOrderId)
      System generated unique id for the compressed order.

    • createTime

      public CompressedOrder.Builder createTime(OffsetDateTime createTime)
      Time of the order creation

    • createTime

      public CompressedOrder.Builder createTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> createTime)
      Time of the order creation

    • cumulativeNotionalValue

      public CompressedOrder.Builder cumulativeNotionalValue(CompressedOrderCumulativeNotionalValue cumulativeNotionalValue)
      The product of order quantity & price, summed across all fills, reported in the currency specified in the order. (This will be rounded to 2 decimal places for USD currencies). Will be absent if an order has no fill information.

    • cumulativeNotionalValue

      public CompressedOrder.Builder cumulativeNotionalValue(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends CompressedOrderCumulativeNotionalValue> cumulativeNotionalValue)
      The product of order quantity & price, summed across all fills, reported in the currency specified in the order. (This will be rounded to 2 decimal places for USD currencies). Will be absent if an order has no fill information.

    • currencyCode

      public CompressedOrder.Builder currencyCode(String currencyCode)
      Defaults to "USD". Only "USD" is supported. Full list of currency codes is defined at: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217

    • currencyCode

      public CompressedOrder.Builder currencyCode(Optional<String> currencyCode)
      Defaults to "USD". Only "USD" is supported. Full list of currency codes is defined at: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217

    • executions

      public CompressedOrder.Builder executions(List<BasketTradingExecutions> executions)
      The execution-level details that compose this order

    • executions

      public CompressedOrder.Builder executions(Optional<? extends List<BasketTradingExecutions>> executions)
      The execution-level details that compose this order

    • filledQuantity

      public CompressedOrder.Builder filledQuantity(CompressedOrderFilledQuantity filledQuantity)
      The summed quantity value across all fills in this order, up to a maximum of 5 decimal places. Will be absent if an order has no fill information.

    • filledQuantity

      public CompressedOrder.Builder filledQuantity(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends CompressedOrderFilledQuantity> filledQuantity)
      The summed quantity value across all fills in this order, up to a maximum of 5 decimal places. Will be absent if an order has no fill information.

    • identifier

      public CompressedOrder.Builder identifier(String identifier)
      Identifier of the asset (of the type specified in `identifier_type`).

    • identifier

      public CompressedOrder.Builder identifier(Optional<String> identifier)
      Identifier of the asset (of the type specified in `identifier_type`).

    • identifierType

      public CompressedOrder.Builder identifierType(CompressedOrderIdentifierType identifierType)
      The identifier type of the asset being ordered. For Equities: only SYMBOL is supported

    • identifierType

      public CompressedOrder.Builder identifierType(Optional<? extends CompressedOrderIdentifierType> identifierType)
      The identifier type of the asset being ordered. For Equities: only SYMBOL is supported

    • lastUpdateTime

      public CompressedOrder.Builder lastUpdateTime(OffsetDateTime lastUpdateTime)
      Time of the last order update

    • lastUpdateTime

      public CompressedOrder.Builder lastUpdateTime(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> lastUpdateTime)
      Time of the last order update

    • name

      public CompressedOrder.Builder name(String name)
      System generated name of the order.

    • name

      public CompressedOrder.Builder name(Optional<String> name)
      System generated name of the order.

    • notionalValue

      public CompressedOrder.Builder notionalValue(CompressedOrderNotionalValue notionalValue)
      Notional quantity of the order, measured in USD. Maximum 2 decimal place precision. Either a quantity or notional_value MUST be specified (but not both). For Equities: currently not supported yet For Mutual Funds: Only supported for BUY orders. The order will be transacted at the full notional amount specified.

    • notionalValue

      public CompressedOrder.Builder notionalValue(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends CompressedOrderNotionalValue> notionalValue)
      Notional quantity of the order, measured in USD. Maximum 2 decimal place precision. Either a quantity or notional_value MUST be specified (but not both). For Equities: currently not supported yet For Mutual Funds: Only supported for BUY orders. The order will be transacted at the full notional amount specified.

    • orderRejectedReason

      public CompressedOrder.Builder orderRejectedReason(CompressedOrderOrderRejectedReason orderRejectedReason)
      When an order has the REJECTED status, this will be populated with a system code describing the rejection.

    • orderRejectedReason

      public CompressedOrder.Builder orderRejectedReason(Optional<? extends CompressedOrderOrderRejectedReason> orderRejectedReason)
      When an order has the REJECTED status, this will be populated with a system code describing the rejection.

    • orderStatus

      public CompressedOrder.Builder orderStatus(CompressedOrderOrderStatus orderStatus)
      The processing status of the order

    • orderStatus

      public CompressedOrder.Builder orderStatus(Optional<? extends CompressedOrderOrderStatus> orderStatus)
      The processing status of the order

    • orderType

      public CompressedOrder.Builder orderType(CompressedOrderOrderType orderType)
      The execution type of this order. Only MARKET is supported.

    • orderType

      public CompressedOrder.Builder orderType(Optional<? extends CompressedOrderOrderType> orderType)
      The execution type of this order. Only MARKET is supported.

    • quantity

      public CompressedOrder.Builder quantity(CompressedOrderQuantity quantity)
      Numeric quantity of the order. Either a quantity or notional_value MUST be specified (but not both). For Equities: Represents the number of shares, must be greater than zero and may not exceed 5 decimal places. For Mutual Funds: Only supported for SELL orders. Represents the number of shares, up to a maximum of 3 decimal places.

    • quantity

      public CompressedOrder.Builder quantity(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends CompressedOrderQuantity> quantity)
      Numeric quantity of the order. Either a quantity or notional_value MUST be specified (but not both). For Equities: Represents the number of shares, must be greater than zero and may not exceed 5 decimal places. For Mutual Funds: Only supported for SELL orders. Represents the number of shares, up to a maximum of 3 decimal places.

    • side

      public CompressedOrder.Builder side(CompressedOrderSide side)
      The side of this order.

    • side

      public CompressedOrder.Builder side(Optional<? extends CompressedOrderSide> side)
      The side of this order.

    • specialReportingInstructions

      public CompressedOrder.Builder specialReportingInstructions(List<CompressedOrderSpecialReportingInstructions> specialReportingInstructions)
      Special Reporting Instructions to be applied to this order. Can include multiple Instructions.

    • specialReportingInstructions

      public CompressedOrder.Builder specialReportingInstructions(Optional<? extends List<CompressedOrderSpecialReportingInstructions>> specialReportingInstructions)
      Special Reporting Instructions to be applied to this order. Can include multiple Instructions.

    • timeInForce

      public CompressedOrder.Builder timeInForce(CompressedOrderTimeInForce timeInForce)
      Must be the value "DAY". Regulatory requirements dictate that the system capture the intended time_in_force, which is why this a mandatory field.

    • timeInForce

      public CompressedOrder.Builder timeInForce(Optional<? extends CompressedOrderTimeInForce> timeInForce)
      Must be the value "DAY". Regulatory requirements dictate that the system capture the intended time_in_force, which is why this a mandatory field.

    • build

      public CompressedOrder build()
